slides.title: Building with Mastra AI
slides.content: A hands-on journey through multi-agent orchestration

slides.title: Why Multi-Agent?
slides.content: Single LLM calls hit limits fast. Multi-agent pipelines let specialized agents collaborate — researcher finds facts, writer crafts narrative, designer builds visuals.

slides.title: Pipeline Architecture
slides.content: The full orchestration pipeline from input to PDF output.

diagram.description: Multi-agent pipeline: Input → Research → Write → Design → Render → PDF

slides.title: Wisdom from the Trenches
slides.content: The best agent is the one that knows when NOT to use an LLM.

slides.title: The Render Pipeline
